div.div:
REF_ID: IA-2024
SYS_STATUS: ACTIVE
MODE: STRICT

div.p: Fresh graduate turned Software Engineering Consultant working on real world problems at scale. When I'm not optimizing code-bases or building AI-powered tools, you'll find me hunting flags in CTFs or chasing apex times in sim racing.

div.div: Building real-time data engines for global factory networks. Processing massive streams of IoT data with InfluxDB & TimeScaleDB — reliability and performance at scale.
Developing SaaS architectures that leverage major LLM APIs (Claude, Gemini, DeepSeek) and computer vision to simplify complex professional workflows.
Specialized in robust software architecture, data structures, and security protocols.

Led a 3-person team building an AI-powered consultant matching engine from scratch. Smart filtering scores consultants based on mission requirements, giving HR/Sales instant insights on availability and client fit.
Delivered mobile and web applications, including a custom valet management system for automotive service centers.

Tearing up Le Mans Ultimate, iRacing, and F1 25 with a Moza R16 setup. Holder of the official Belgian Esport driving license. Still learning the ropes, but optimizing racing lines is just another engineering problem.
Capturing beautifully engineered machines. There's something about the curves of a well-designed car that just hits different.
Because breaking things (legally) is the best way to learn how to build secure systems. Active on TryHackMe, Infinity Learning, and European CTFs.

"Building systems that scale, breaking challenges that don't,
and racing lines that probably won't make me faster."
